message:
I am thinking...: I have successfully created the core infrastructure files (package.json, tsconfig.json, next.config.js, prisma/schema.prisma, globals.css, and the NextAuth route).

According to the task and the scratchpad, I need to continue creating the remaining files:
- src/app/layout.tsx
- src/app/page.tsx
- src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts
- src/app/api/menu/route.ts
- src/app/api/orders/route.ts
- src/app/dashboard/page.tsx
- src/app/auth/login/page.tsx
- src/app/auth/register/page.tsx
- src/components/Navbar.tsx
- src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx
- src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx
- src/components/OrderTable.tsx
- src/middleware.ts
- .env.example

I will proceed by creating these files in batches. I will start with the layout and main page.
